page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores from the Intel Xeon processor family running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 1.0 thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is not enabled. It includes 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring reliance on external block storage volumes for persistent data. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 CPU-to-memory ratio position this instance as a resource-dense option for workloads requiring dedicated compute power without the overhead of excess memory.

Given the compute-centric 1:2 RAM-to-CPU ratio and dedicated core allocation, the ecs.u2i-c1m2.2xlarge is suited for compute-bound tasks that do not require massive memory footprints. Appropriate workloads include batch processing, web serving, microservices, and lightweight compilation or CI/CD pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.2xlarge is an x86_64 virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz with a single thread per core configuration. The instance features 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a compute-focused 1:2 memory-to-CPU ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. Lacking integrated GPUs, this instance is designed for non-accelerated, compute-heavy workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for tasks requiring consistent processing power without the premium of high-capacity memory. It is suited for batch processing, web serving, and CI/CD pipelines.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.2xlarge is a KVM-based instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for compute-heavy workloads without local storage.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core Intel Xeon instance with a compute-optimized memory ratio and five gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth.

16.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio
